nasb.text: To this present hour we are both hungry and thirsty, and are poorly clothed, and are roughly treated, and are homeless;

esv.text: To the present hour we hunger and thirst, we are poorly dressed and buffeted and homeless,

cnv.text: 直到現在，我們還是又飢又渴，衣不蔽體，又挨打，又沒有棲身的地方，

ccb.text: 我们至今还是又饥又渴，衣不蔽体，遭受毒打，居无定所，

csbs.text: 直到现在这时刻，我们还是又饥又渴，衣不蔽体，被人殴打，居无定所，
